Natural
Care That Works.

SiLu Naturals is a South African brand crafting premium natural products — and offering a powerful business opportunity through our distributor network.

About Us
Rooted in Nature.
Built for Growth.

SiLu Naturals is a South African natural products brand based in Port Elizabeth, Eastern Cape. We were created to meet the need for high-quality natural products that promote growth and a healthy scalp for everyone.

We manufacture and supply natural products while offering a network marketing business opportunity for independent sales agents to resell the products and earn a 100% profit plus ongoing commissions.

Currently available across South Africa.

Vision

To become the most trusted and recommended natural products brand in the world.

Mission

Manufacture the best natural products while empowering people with a direct selling financial opportunity.

100% Profit

Every product you sell personally — you keep 100% of the profit. No splits, no sharing.

Incentives

Earn promotional gifts and vacation rewards as you grow your rank and team.

Our Products
Multiple Products.
One Powerful Range.
Best Seller
Hair Growth Oil

Our signature natural oil blend, crafted to nourish your scalp, reduce breakage, and stimulate healthy hair growth from root to tip.

New
Hair Growth Serum

A lightweight, fast-absorbing serum that targets your follicles directly — delivering essential nutrients for stronger, thicker, longer strands.

Earn More
Commission Structure

As you grow your team and sales volume, you advance in rank and earn higher commission percentages. Every product you sell personally earns you 100% profit — plus commission on your team's sales.

Rank Referrals Required Commission % Levels Earned Monthly Product
Quota		 Potential Earnings Rank Bonus
Member 5 10% Level 1 only R600 R300 – R500 —
Team Player 10 10% Levels 1, 2 & 3 R600 R600 – R1,000 R1,000
Team Leader 30 + 2 Team Players 12% Levels 1, 2 & 3 R900 R2,160 – R3,600 R1,500
Manager 100 + 2 TPs + 2 TLs 14% Levels 1, 2 & 3 R1,500 R8,400 – R14,000 R2,000
Director 500 + 2 TLs + 1 Mgr 16% Levels 1, 2 & 3 R2,500 R48,000 – R80,000 R5,000
Chairperson 800 + 2 Mgrs + 1 Dir 18% Levels 1, 2, 3 & 4 R5,000 R480,000 – R800,000 R10,000

* Commission is calculated on team (downline) sales. Levels 1–3 = purchases made by your direct recruits and their recruits. Level 4 unlocked at Chairperson rank.

Account Maintenance

To keep your account active and qualify for commissions and bonuses, you must purchase a minimum value of SiLu Naturals products every 30 days. Your required spend depends on your rank.

📋 What Your Monthly Product Quota Covers
✅Active account status — ability to sell and recruit freely
✅Qualify for commission payments from your team
✅Rank bonuses and incentive eligibility
✅Shows commitment to growing the business
⚠️ Grace Period: You have 7 days after your due date before admin can suspend your account. During grace period, commissions are paused.
⛔ Suspension: After the grace period, the administrator may suspend your account. Pay immediately to restore access.
📅 Your 6-Month Payment Schedule

Distributor Disclaimers

These are the terms and conditions you accepted when registering as a SiLu Naturals distributor. Please keep these in mind as you build your business.

✅
Disclaimers Accepted
You accepted these terms on registration date.
SiLu Naturals — Distributor Terms
  1. You are only allowed to rank up one level a month.
  2. Results are not typical. Income varies based on effort and market conditions.
  3. This is a business opportunity and not a guaranteed investment.
  4. Distributors are independent and are liable for their own actions.
  5. Distributors are independent contractors and not employees.
  6. Our products are for personal use or resale.
  7. Distributors are independent and responsible for their own sales and marketing.
  8. Results are not guaranteed. Contact a professional for hair advice.
  9. The maintenance fee is required in order to be eligible to earn your commission.
⚠️ A non-refundable registration fee of R99 was charged upon sign-up, in addition to your chosen pack. This fee activated your distributor account.

Before You Continue

Distributor Disclaimer

Please read and accept all terms before registering.

By registering as a SiLu Naturals distributor, you confirm that you have read, understood and agree to the following:

  1. You are only allowed to rank up one level a month.
  2. Results are not typical. Income varies based on effort and market conditions.
  3. This is a business opportunity and not a guaranteed investment.
  4. Distributors are independent and are liable for their own actions.
  5. Distributors are independent contractors and not employees.
  6. Our products are for personal use or resale.
  7. Distributors are independent and responsible for their own sales and marketing.
  8. Results are not guaranteed. Contact a professional for hair advice.
  9. The maintenance fee is required in order to be eligible to earn your commission.
⚠️ A non-refundable registration fee of R99 is charged upon sign-up, in addition to your chosen pack. This fee activates your distributor account.

I have read and understood all the above disclaimers. I agree to the terms and conditions of becoming a SiLu Naturals distributor.

Before You Register

Terms & Disclaimers

Please read and accept all terms before continuing.

  1. You are only allowed to rank up one level a month.
  2. Results are not typical — income varies based on effort and market conditions.
  3. This is a business opportunity and not a guaranteed investment.
  4. Distributors are independent and are liable for their own actions.
  5. Distributors are independent contractors and not employees.
  6. Our products are for personal use or resale.
  7. Distributors are independent and responsible for their own sales and marketing.
  8. Results are not guaranteed — contact a professional for hair advice.
  9. A maintenance fee is required to be eligible to earn your commission.
  10. Use the correct identification details that will be properly verified.
